name: Select → Is
description: This [Condition](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-conditions) checks if the select is set to any one of a list of options. A lambda may also be used for more complex computations.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the select to test.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: A lambda returning a boolean value. The current selection is passed in a `StringRef` argument called `current`.

config_entries.label: Options
config_entries.description: A string, or list of strings to compare with the current selection. The condition is true if any match.
